description_long: This refrigerator features a sleek, modern design with a glossy black finish and a prominent digital control panel on the upper front door. The appliance has a French door configuration, with two vertical doors on the top section and a horizontal handle separating the upper and lower compartments. The sides and back are flat and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The front panel includes a subtle brand logo above the control panel, and the handle is smoothly integrated into the door design. The refrigerator appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with likely insulation and air-filled compartments inside. Its overall appearance suggests a high-end, contemporary appliance suitable for urban environments.
description: A glossy black, French door refrigerator with a digital control panel and integrated handle, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black double doors, digital control panel, brand logo, and integrated horizontal handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the flat, unadorned black side panel and the depth of the refrigerator.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, featureless black back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a flat, smooth black surface and visible door edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white brand logo is visible above the control panel on the upper front door.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated horizontal handle, flush with the door surface, located between the upper and lower compartments.
